party.iroiro.luajava

Class Lua54

  • java.lang.Object
    • party.iroiro.luajava.AbstractLua
      • party.iroiro.luajava.Lua54
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable, Lua

    public class Lua54
extends AbstractLua
    A thin wrapper around a Lua 5.4 Lua state
